caption: A panel discussion takes place on a stage with a dark purple background illuminated by vertical pink light tubes. Three people are seated in gold-framed chairs: a man on the left wearing a white button-down shirt, a woman in the center wearing a black t-shirt and black trousers, and a man on the right wearing a grey suit jacket and grey trousers. In front of each person sits a small, white, intricately textured cubic object. Throughout the sequence, the man in the suit is speaking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points, while the other two participants listen attentively. The woman sits with her hands clasped in her lap, and the man in the white shirt maintains a similar poised posture. In the background, partially obscured text is visible, showing the letters "L L S" in a stylized, colorful font. The scene remains static in composition as only the man in the suit moves.
